name: Silk Draped Midi Dress
description: Effortlessly elegant, this silk-blend midi dress features a fluid drape and adjustable tie waist. Perfect for both daytime sophistication and evening allure.

name: Tailored Wool Blazer
description: A masterclass in modern tailoring. This single-breasted blazer is crafted from Italian wool, with a slim silhouette designed to elevate any wardrobe.

name: Structured Leather Tote
description: Handcrafted from full-grain leather, this structured tote seamlessly combines form and function. Spacious interior with polished gold hardware.

name: Cashmere Ribbed Sweater
description: Pure cashmere in a classic ribbed knit. Understated luxury at its finest.
